summary: First iteration testing of EligeHub SaaS (multi-tenant FastAPI + React, Italian UI). Comprehensive backend pytest suite (22 tests, 100% pass) covering auth, RBAC, multi-tenant isolation, CRUD (clienti/docenti/orari/appuntamenti), overlap prevention, disponibilita and dashboard stats. Frontend smoke + critical-flow tests via Playwright (login for 3 roles, role-based redirects, sidebar visibility per role, navigation to Dashboard/Clienti/Docenti/Orari/Appuntamenti/Studios, appuntamento create modal, logout). All core flows work end-to-end.

issues: KPI card data-testid values do not match the names in review_request. Actual: kpi-clienti-totali, kpi-docenti, kpi-appuntamenti-oggi, kpi-appuntamenti-7-giorni (derived from label). Expected per spec: kpi-clienti, kpi-oggi, kpi-settimana. Functionality fine, but selectors used by future automation may break.

upcoming-list testid only renders when prossimi_appuntamenti is non-empty; the empty state uses a different element (with empty-create-appointment testid). Consider rendering upcoming-list container always for stable selector.
Modal uses browser-native HTML date input and time inputs (06/12/2026, 09:00 AM/10:00 AM) instead of shadcn/Italian-localized pickers. Time displays in 12-hour AM/PM in Chrome despite Italian UI.

action_items: (Optional) Align dashboard KPI data-testid values with the documented contract (kpi-clienti, kpi-oggi, kpi-settimana) for stable E2E selectors.
(Optional) Always render the upcoming-list container (even when empty) so the testid is reliable.
(Optional) Replace native <input type=date|time> in Appuntamento modal with localized shadcn calendar/time pickers to match Italian UX and 24h convention.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend: server.py is 800 lines - acceptable for a single-file MVP but consider splitting into routers (auth/studios/docenti/clienti/orari/appuntamenti/dashboard) as the codebase grows.
Backend: bcrypt hashes generated correctly ($2b$ format verified via successful logins); JWT HS256 with 24h expiry. JWT_SECRET stored in backend/.env (good).

Backend: CORS uses '*' with allow_credentials=True which is technically invalid per spec but works due to bearer-token auth (no cookies in use). If cookies are introduced later, explicit origins must be set.
Backend: studio_id scoping enforced in every protected route via _scope_studio_id; cross-tenant leakage verified absent.
Backend: Overlap check uses correct strict-inequality predicate {dal<al, al>dal} with stato != 'annullato'.
Backend: seed_super_admin_and_demo updates super_admin password if env changed - matches playbook expectation. Demo studio is only seeded if missing (idempotent).
Frontend: localStorage token key is 'eh_token' as documented.
Frontend: All /api calls use REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL via axios baseURL (verified).
seed_data_creation: Pytest tests prefix all created entities with TEST_ and clean up. A TEST_Studio_Iso studio is created and deleted within test_create_and_delete_studio_and_isolation.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers 22 tests across 7 classes (Auth, RoleIsolation, StudiosAndScoping, ClientiCRUD, DocentiCRUD, Orari, Appuntamenti, Dashboard). Run with: pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v. All passed on first run. Only cosmetic frontend issues remain (KPI testid naming and native date/time pickers). No mocked APIs. JWT bearer tokens stored in localStorage as 'eh_token'.
